description: Bridges: Method `getUserRoles()` must have `public function get<DomainEntity>Collection(<DomainEntity>CriteriaTransfer): <DomainEntity>CollectionTransfer` signature.
Bridges: Method `getCurrentUser()` must have `public function get<DomainEntity>Collection(<DomainEntity>CriteriaTransfer): <DomainEntity>CollectionTransfer` signature.

Zed Business Layer - Facade: There are properties in class `Spryker\Zed\AclEntity\Business\AclEntityFacade` which violates rule "A facade must not have properties. It must also not contain any instantiations, only delegation."

Zed Business Layer - Facade: The method `Spryker\Zed\AclEntity\Business\AclEntityFacade::isActive()()` contains a `if` statement which violates the rule "A Facade must not contain logic and only delegate."
